footer.description: Free online tools for web developers, designers, and marketers.

desktopOnly.title: This tool works on a larger screen
desktopOnly.description: To use this tool comfortably, open it on a laptop, desktop computer, or tablet in landscape mode.
desktopOnly.tipText: If you are using a tablet, switch it to landscape mode - when the window width is large enough, the tool will load automatically.

cookie.title: Cookies and privacy
cookie.description: We use cookies to keep the site running, analyse traffic, and show ads. Learn more in our
cookie.essentialDescription: The site cannot function without these. They do not collect marketing data.
cookie.analyticsDescription: Visit statistics. Enables Google Analytics 4 with your consent.
cookie.adsDescription: Personalized ads based on your interests.
cookie.changeDecision: You can change your decision at any time

contactForm.subjectPlaceholder: e.g. Bug report | Tool suggestion | Question
contactForm.error: Something went wrong. Please check your data and try again.
contactForm.success: Message sent! We will respond as soon as possible.

infoBanner.text: Email signature generator update - check out new features

search.emptyHint: Type a phrase, e.g. "favicon generator", "image editor" or "contact" to find a related page.

imageConverter.clickToSelect: or click to choose files from your device
imageConverter.qualityHelper: Lower value = smaller files, higher = better quality. 80–85% is a good balance.
imageConverter.emptyState: Add {{source}} files on the left to start converting to {{target}}.
imageConverter.formatChangeConfirm: Changing format will remove files from the queue. Continue?
imageConverter.errorCanvas: Canvas is not supported in this browser.
imageConverter.errorWrongFormat: Add {{format}} files - other formats are skipped.
imageConverter.errorAvifNotSupported: Your browser does not support AVIF encoding. Use Chrome, Edge, or Firefox.
imageConverter.onlyImageFiles: Only image files are supported (JPG, PNG, WebP, SVG, GIF, BMP).
imageConverter.base64Invalid: Invalid Base64 string - not a valid image.
imageConverter.base64Placeholder: Base64 code will appear here after adding an image
imageConverter.base64PastePlaceholder: Paste a Base64 image string (with or without data:image/... prefix)
imageConverter.base64DecodeHint: Paste Base64 and click Decode to see a preview

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: It looks like the page you are looking for does not exist. Click the button to go back to the homepage.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try refreshing the page or contact us if the problem persists.
